description: Public DID→wallet resolver. Returns the primary wallet for a DID on a given chain, plus an optional detached service-auth JWT (proof) the caller can verify offline via standard DID resolution.

includeProof.description: Include a service-auth JWT proof of the binding (default true).

proof.description: Service-auth JWT signed by the DID's atproto key.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: NoPrimaryWallet
errors.description: No active primary wallet for this DID on this chain.
